sections.heading: 1. Introduction
sections.content: The Pet Headquarters ("we", "us", "our") is committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and share your information when you use our website and services, in accordance with the UK General Data Protection Regulation (UK GDPR) and the Data Protection Act 2018.

sections.heading: 2. Information We Collect
sections.content: We may collect: contact information (name, email, phone number, delivery address) when you place an order or create an account; payment information processed securely through our payment providers; browsing data including pages visited, products viewed, and search queries; device and technical data such as IP address, browser type, and operating system; communication data from emails, contact forms, or customer service interactions.

sections.heading: 3. How We Use Your Information
sections.content: We use your data to: process and fulfil your orders; communicate about your orders and account; improve our website and product offerings; send marketing communications (only with your consent); comply with legal obligations; prevent fraud and maintain security.

sections.heading: 4. Legal Basis for Processing
sections.content: We process your data based on: contractual necessity (to fulfil orders); legitimate interests (to improve our services); consent (for marketing communications); legal obligation (tax and regulatory requirements).

sections.heading: 5. Data Sharing
sections.content: We may share your data with: payment processors to handle transactions; delivery partners to ship your orders; analytics providers to understand website usage. We never sell your personal data to third parties.

sections.heading: 6. Data Retention
sections.content: We retain your personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfil the purposes outlined in this policy, or as required by law. Order data is retained for 7 years for tax and legal compliance.

sections.heading: 7. Your Rights
sections.content: Under UK GDPR, you have the right to: access your personal data; rectify inaccurate data; erase your data (right to be forgotten); restrict processing; data portability; object to processing; withdraw consent at any time. To exercise these rights, contact us at hello@thepetheadquarters.co.uk.

sections.heading: 8. Cookies
sections.content: We use cookies to improve your browsing experience. For full details, please see our Cookie Policy.

sections.heading: 9. Contact
sections.content: For questions about this Privacy Policy or your data, contact us at hello@thepetheadquarters.co.uk.

sections.heading: 1. Introduction
sections.content: These Terms and Conditions govern your use of The Pet Headquarters website and the purchase of products from us. By using our website or placing an order, you agree to these terms. We are a UK-based company and these terms are governed by the laws of England and Wales.

sections.heading: 2. Products and Pricing
sections.content: All prices are displayed in British Pounds (GBP) and include VAT where applicable. We make every effort to ensure pricing is accurate, but reserve the right to correct errors. Product descriptions and images are for illustration purposes; actual products may vary slightly.

sections.heading: 3. Orders and Payment
sections.content: By placing an order, you are making an offer to purchase. We may accept or decline your order at our discretion. Payment is taken at the time of order. We accept major credit and debit cards through our secure payment processor.

sections.heading: 4. Delivery
sections.content: We aim to deliver within the estimated timeframe provided at checkout. Delivery times are estimates and not guaranteed. Risk of loss passes to you upon delivery. We are not liable for delays caused by events outside our control.

sections.heading: 5. Returns and Refunds
sections.content: Under the Consumer Rights Act 2015 and Consumer Contracts Regulations 2013, you have the right to cancel your order within 14 days of receiving the goods. Goods must be returned in their original condition. Refunds will be processed within 14 days of receiving the returned goods.

sections.heading: 6. Consumer Rights
sections.content: Your statutory rights under UK consumer law are not affected by these terms. Products must be of satisfactory quality, fit for purpose, and as described. If a product is faulty, you have the right to a repair, replacement, or refund.

sections.heading: 7. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: We are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of our website or products, except where liability cannot be excluded by law.

sections.heading: 8. Changes to Terms
sections.content: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of our website after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

sections.heading: 9. Contact
sections.content: For questions about these terms, contact us at hello@thepetheadquarters.co.uk.

sections.heading: 1. The short version
sections.content: We use as little tracking as possible. We don't use Google Analytics, Facebook Pixel, advertising cookies, or any third-party trackers. We run our own privacy-friendly anonymous analytics so we can see which pages are popular and how to improve the site — nothing more.

sections.heading: 2. Strictly necessary cookies
sections.content: When you sign in to your account, we set two short-lived cookies (tph_access and tph_refresh) so you can stay logged in across page loads and check out securely. These are essential for the service you've asked for and cannot be disabled. They are deleted when you log out.

sections.heading: 3. Cart and preferences (browser storage)
sections.content: Your shopping cart and any promo code you've applied are stored in your browser's local storage so they survive page refreshes. This data never leaves your device and is deleted when you place an order or clear your browser data. No identifier is sent to us.

sections.heading: 4. Anonymous analytics
sections.content: We track aggregate information about which pages people visit, how long they stay, and which products are popular, so we can improve the site. We do this without setting any cookies and without storing your IP address. Each visitor is identified by a one-way hash that resets every 24 hours, so we can't recognise you across days or devices unless you're logged in. Under PECR (the UK's cookie law) this kind of first-party anonymous analytics does not require your consent, but we show a notice anyway because we think you should know.

sections.heading: 5. Opting out
sections.content: If you'd rather we didn't run analytics on your visit, click 'Reject analytics' in the privacy notice when you arrive. You can also enable Do Not Track in your browser settings — we respect that signal automatically. Opting out doesn't break anything; the site works exactly the same.

sections.heading: 6. What we don't do
sections.content: We don't sell, share, or transfer your data to third parties. We don't use cookies to track you across other websites. We don't show personalised ads. We don't use session replay, heatmaps, or any tool that records what you click or type.

sections.heading: 7. Updates
sections.content: We may update this policy as the site evolves. The 'last updated' date at the top will reflect any changes.

sections.heading: 8. Contact
sections.content: Questions about how we handle your data? Email hello@thepetheadquarters.co.uk.
